app.name: ReviewMine AI
app.tagline: Crawl & summarize product reviews from YouTube and TikTok
app.disclaimer: ReviewMine AI can make mistakes. Please verify important information.

meta.title: ReviewMine AI
meta.description: Crawl & summarize product reviews from YouTube and TikTok — know good products before you buy.

chat.inputPlaceholder: Ask a question... (Shift+Enter for new line)
chat.guestLimitHint: 1 free message used. Sign in to save history.
chat.guestLimitReached: You've used your free message. Sign in to continue.
chat.greeting: What would you like to ask today?
suggestions: What do users say about iPhone 16 Pro Max?
Is the Samsung Galaxy S24 worth buying based on YouTube reviews?
Compare MacBook Air M3 vs Dell XPS on TikTok

product.panelHint: Pick a product → ask AI for reviews
product.hint: Find a product, then tap Ask AI review to analyze YouTube & TikTok
product.qrHint: Scan to open Tiki product page
product.aiReviewTooltip: Ask AI to review this product on YouTube & TikTok
product.aiReviewPrompt: Review the product "{{name}}" on YouTube and TikTok. Tiki price: {{price}}. Link: {{url}}
product.reviewsError: Could not load reviews. Try again later.

fpt.panelHint: Pick a product → ask AI for reviews
fpt.hint: Find FPT Shop products, then tap Ask AI review to analyze YouTube & TikTok
fpt.loadError: Could not load FPT Shop products
fpt.qrHint: Scan to open FPT Shop product page
fpt.aiReviewPrompt: Review the product "{{name}}" on YouTube and TikTok. FPT Shop price: {{price}}. Link: {{url}}

shortener.placeholder: Enter a long URL to shorten...

hero.desc: Ask ReviewMine AI about any product. AI automatically aggregates real user reviews from <yt></yt> and <tt></tt> — no ads, no bias.

demo.question: Is iPhone 15 Pro Max worth buying?
demo.qualityQuote: camera is a huge step up from 14, especially for night video
demo.priceQuote: price is still steep compared to Android flagships

steps.title: Ask about a product
steps.body: Type any product name you are curious about — phones, laptops, cosmetics, home appliances...

steps.title: AI searches automatically
steps.body: ReviewMine AI finds and analyzes videos + comments from YouTube and TikTok — you do nothing else.

steps.title: Get a summary
steps.body: Receive an instant report by topic: quality, price, shipping, warranty — with real verbatim quotes.

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: AI Chat is the core — search products from partner stores right beside your conversation.

items.title: AI Review Chat
items.body: Deep Q&A on specs and real user experiences from YouTube & TikTok — compare competitors in seconds.

items.title: Product Search
items.body: Search prices next to chat — tap Ask AI review, shorten links and generate QR on each product without leaving the conversation.

examples.label: Examples
examples.title: Ask what you really want to know

items.q: "Is iPhone 17 Pro Max worth the price?"
items.a: Analyzes 120+ comments from the 5 highest-viewed <yt></yt> videos.

items.q: "Does Sony WH-1000XM6 have good noise cancelling?"
"Is the MSI 27-inch gaming monitor shipped correctly?"
items.a: Verbatim quotes from the community — not from the seller page.

items.title: No ads
items.body: Data only from real user comments, not from seller pages.

items.title: Fast
items.body: Analyzes hundreds of comments in seconds.

items.title: Clear attribution
items.body: Every review has a source — <yt></yt> or <tt></tt>, how many people mentioned it.

items.title: Free to try
items.body: No sign-up required. No credit card needed.

footer.desc: Make smarter purchase decisions with AI — real review insights from YouTube & TikTok.
footer.copyright: © 2026 ReviewMine AI. Precision insights from YouTube & TikTok.
